name: Impossible Cheeseburger Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F. Grease a pie plate.
2. Brown the beef and onion together; drain excess fat if necessary. Stir in salt and pepper. Spread mixture into the prepared pie plate.
3. In a blender or bowl with a hand mixer, combine milk, Bisquick, and eggs until smooth (15 seconds or 1 minute).
4. Pour the batter over the beef mixture, spreading it evenly.
5. Bake for 25 minutes. Top with sliced tomatoes and sprinkle shredded cheese on top.
6. Continue baking until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean (about 5-8 minutes). Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
